issue22.title: increase the performance

issue22.notes: Performance optimization targets: slow inbox switching, background tasks blocking foreground navigation. Maintainer planning architectural fixes.

pr19.title: Add CLI tool configuration for agents
pr19.author: ankitvgupta
pr19.notes: User-configurable CLI tools in Settings → Agents with PreToolUse hook enforcement, shell operator protection, 1205 tests passing. Allows agents to use custom commands (ls, curl, jq) with gated permissions.

pr18.title: Enable auto-discovery for electron-devtools-testing skill
pr18.author: ankitvgupta
pr18.notes: Removed disable-model-invocation flag from skill frontmatter to enable Claude auto-suggestion when users ask to test the app

pr17.title: Infrastructure uplevel — logger, cost tracking, linting, evals
pr17.author: ankitvgupta
pr17.notes: Production-grade infrastructure: pino logging (450+ console → structured), AnthropicService with retry + cost tracking, DB migrations, ESLint + Prettier zero violations, LLM eval harness, comprehensive docs
